name: GraniteShares 1x Short FATANG Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 1x Short FATANG Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) designed to provide investors with a daily return equivalent to -1 times the daily performance of the FATANG index, which represents a group of large Chinese technology companies. The ETC is managed by GraniteShares and aims to offer a leveraged inverse exposure to the performance of these technology stocks for sophisticated investors. It is based in London, UK.
